whatThisPluginAdds.text: Theme Foundation provides the shared public layouts, runtime design tokens, layout defaults, and override contracts used by Capell themes. It renders host-owned page data and does not introduce a separate content model.

surfaceOutcome.text: Sites can use Foundation directly or extend it with a child theme, while public pages share predictable layout and token rendering without frontend authoring state.

developers.text: The package centralizes theme registration, token resolution, layout defaults, and public-output safety contracts for the theme fleet.

teams.text: Teams get a consistent baseline for site chrome, layout behavior, and design settings across Capell themes.
